input.prProblem: DataBridge, the service that exports your records in batches, restarted an interrupted export from the beginning instead of continuing.
input.prFix: An interrupted export now resumes from the last finished batch.

problemScenes.caption: A halted export threw away the 90 batches it had already finished and began again.

fixScenes.caption: A restarted export now picks up at the next unfinished batch.

input.verdictLine: Converged in 4 rounds; 3 distinct issue classes were caught and fixed.

issueClasses.plainName: Tests did not declare their return type
issueClasses.cause: Several new test functions did not state that they return nothing, which the project's type checker wants.
Two variables used a generic placeholder name the project bans.
Warning text was written inline in code instead of shared configuration.
